expectations.text: An availability record is produced capturing Alice as in (12-1), Bob as out, and Carol as in/flexible
expectations.evidence: availability.json: Alice free [["12:00","13:00"]]; Bob wants_lunch:false (out, dentist); Carol flexible (free: null).

expectations.text: Dave, Erin, and Frank are identified as not yet responded and a nudge message is drafted for them
expectations.evidence: availability.json nudged: [dave, erin, frank]; drafts.md has one warm, skippable nudge DM to each of Dave, Erin, Frank.

expectations.text: Nina (not on the roster) is onboarded: the draft asks for her work email and does not demand other personal details
expectations.evidence: pending_onboarding: [nina, awaiting_email]; drafts.md onboarding DM asks ONLY for her work email and explicitly does not pair her or add her to participants.json yet.

expectations.text: Bob is excluded from today's lunch pool because he opted out
expectations.evidence: Bob recorded wants_lunch:false and is not nudged; "Not messaged ... Bob — already responded: out today. Respecting the opt-out".

expectations.text: No pairings or calendar invites are produced — this is the collection phase only
expectations.evidence: No groups.json and no calendar invites; drafts.md contains only nudges + onboarding. Phase A collect only.
